title: mehtaeyeinstitute
heading: WE ARE SERVING PEOPLE FOR OVER 46 YEARS BOOK AN APPOINTMENT
description: Experience top-tier ophthalmic services at Mehta International Eye Institute, offering advanced treatments for cataracts, glaucoma, and more in Mumbai.
addresses: Mehta International Eye Institute Sea Side Building, 147, Shahid Bhagat Singh Road, Near Colaba Bus Station, Colaba, Mumbai – 400005, Maharashtra, India

          Institute has an eye care team that provides the professional support necessary
          to ensure that every patient receives personal attention. Our dedicated staff is

Mehta, the surgical chief and director of Mehta International Eye Institute,

      to our patients through our committed, professionally oriented team. We aspire for total customer Satisfaction 
      in all ophthalmological services we undertake and will constantly strive for continual improvement. MISSION We want you to see as well many years from now as you do today,

          facilities so patients receive the best care possible. NATIONAL ACCREDITATION BOARD FOR HOSPITALS & HEALTHCARE PROVIDERS (NABH) CERTIFIED INSTITUTE Mehta International Eye Institute is a recognized center for patient care,
